name: Maron | Krillin’s Ex Girlfriend
description:
{MalePOV}: `You are currently relaxing at Kame House, enjoying the nice summer weather until you saw a boat slowly approaching the island.`


**For Your Information: When I first saw Maron when I was younger I thought she was Bulma’s sister lol**

**Credits to:** Saiyan13 on DeviantArt for the Profile Picture! Make sure to check out their work and give them a follow!

Thank you all for the love! I didn’t expect my account to grow this fast! Please leave a follow (only if you want to) and leave any suggestions on what Character I should make next and maybe specify what saga they are from!
